project.name: Ghost Build Tracker
project.current_focus: Phase 7 near-MVP closure: real approved follow-through executor and blocked-work retry-unblock path

phases.title: Phase 1 — Foundation
phases.summary: Core repository, operator lane, and baseline runtime environment were established.

steps.title: Foundation baseline established
steps.detail: Core repository structure, operator lane conventions, and local runtime baseline were stabilized.

phases.title: Phase 2 — Core runtime
phases.summary: Live webhook runtime and route-class handling reached stable baseline behavior.

steps.title: Core runtime route stabilized
steps.detail: Webhook intake, provider routing classes, and normalized response contract became stable.

phases.title: Phase 3 — Production hardening groundwork
phases.summary: Production safety groundwork landed around approval risk gating, artifact capture, and live promotion/rollback discipline.

steps.title: Approval and risk control foundation
steps.detail: Codex-bound approval gating and structured risk metadata shaping were stabilized.

steps.title: Live promotion and rollback groundwork
steps.detail: Operator promotion path, backup discipline, and restore behavior were established for safe live updates.

phases.title: Phase 4 — Structured memory and workflow maturity
phases.summary: Structured Postgres memory path matured with conservative extraction and broader validation readiness.

steps.title: Structured memory lifecycle stabilized
steps.detail: Memory extraction, filtering, save path, and recall behavior were hardened in controlled workflow iterations.

steps.title: Memory quality review and cutover readiness
steps.detail: Final review and production-cutover planning landed with no new blocking quality issues.

phases.title: Phase 5 — Truth and operational trust
phases.summary: Operational truth surfaces were formalized through runtime ledgering and topology-level runtime traceability.

steps.title: Runtime ledger foundation
steps.detail: Task/run ledger start-complete lifecycle and correlation payload handling were integrated into runtime flow.

steps.title: Operational traceability baseline
steps.detail: Runtime topology mapping, trace tooling, and ledger-linked observability were consolidated for operator trust.

phases.title: Phase 6 — Structural maintainability
phases.summary: Operator safety envelope and canonical build/runtime naming normalization strengthened maintainability.

steps.title: Operator promotion safety envelope
steps.detail: Bounded backup/validate/activate/probe/rollback promotion wrapper and rollback checks were landed and verified.

steps.title: Canonical artifact naming normalization
steps.detail: Transitional milestone naming was removed from active builder/runtime artifact paths in favor of stable canonical names.

phases.title: Phase 7 — Governed operator system
phases.summary: Active near-MVP lane for governed operator execution; core foundations are in place with one major backend follow-through gap still open.

steps.title: Worker registry foundation
steps.detail: Worker contracts and route ownership boundaries are established, with explicit worker lanes documented.

steps.title: Capability registry foundation
steps.detail: Capabilities are scoped per worker with explicit-route usage guidance rather than universal fallback execution.

steps.title: Approval governance foundation
steps.detail: Approval-required gating, risk classification, and blocked response shaping are in the governed execution path.

steps.title: Action history foundation
steps.detail: Runtime ledger and trace surfaces provide operational action history across governed execution flow.

steps.title: Diagnostic foundation
steps.detail: Operator-facing smoke and runtime/memory trace scripts provide compact diagnostics for live verification.

steps.title: Environment awareness foundation
steps.detail: Workspace/agent lane model is documented and used for isolated execution and review discipline.

steps.title: Durable governed core and follow-through
steps.detail: Phase 7 is near-MVP. The largest remaining backend gap is the real approved follow-through executor and blocked-work retry-unblock path.

substeps.title: Real approved follow-through executor
substeps.detail: Implement the real approval-cleared follow-through executor path for governed operations.

active_workers.name: Claude
active_workers.task: Close MVP gap on real approved follow-through executor path

substeps.title: Blocked-work retry-unblock path
substeps.detail: Land the real retry/unblock flow for previously blocked governed work items.

phases.title: Phase 8 — Adaptive operations
phases.summary: Planned adaptive operations expansion; top-level structure is seeded without speculative deep substep trees.

steps.title: 8A Strategy layer
steps.detail: Planned strategy abstraction for adaptive runtime governance.

steps.title: 8B Adaptive routing and worker optimization
steps.detail: Planned adaptive route and worker optimization path.

steps.title: 8C Project / workspace awareness
steps.detail: Planned deeper project/workspace context awareness for execution decisions.

steps.title: 8D Internal tool generation at scale
steps.detail: Planned scalable internal tool generation capabilities.

steps.title: 8E Continuous improvement loop
steps.detail: Planned loop for incremental operational improvement and tuning.

steps.title: 8F Richer simulation and scenario testing
steps.detail: Planned scenario simulation expansion for safer operational rollout.

steps.title: 8G Operator copiloting
steps.detail: Planned operator copiloting enhancements for guided operations.

steps.title: 8H Higher-order governance
steps.detail: Planned higher-order governance controls and policies.

steps.title: 8I Phase 8 freeze and architecture review
steps.detail: Planned freeze checkpoint and architecture review gate for Phase 8.

phases.title: Phase 9 — Platformization
phases.summary: Planned platformization phase remains intentionally coarse until authoritative execution details are finalized.

steps.title: Platformization baseline
steps.detail: Define and deliver core platformization surfaces for governed Ghost operations.

steps.title: Platform operator surface
steps.detail: Shape a stable platform-grade operator surface with durable contracts.

phases.title: Phase 10 — Product maturity / ecosystem
phases.summary: Planned product-maturity and ecosystem phase remains coarse by design until platformization outcomes settle.

steps.title: Product maturity baseline
steps.detail: Planned maturation of product-facing quality, reliability, and governance outcomes.

steps.title: Ecosystem expansion
steps.detail: Planned ecosystem and external-surface expansion once core maturity gates are satisfied.

recent_activity.note: Phase 7 near-MVP closure focused on the real approved follow-through executor path
Safe workflow promotion wrapper and rollback safety checks landed
Canonical workflow builder and runtime artifact naming normalization completed
Runtime ledger and operator truth tracing foundations advanced
Agent-management workspace model and environment-awareness baseline established
Tracker contract hardening landed for lightweight operator diagnostics visibility
